global_rules: Gates 59–79 remain closed; this corrective pack starts at Gate 80 and does not reopen the successor tranche.
One branch per gate. Finish the gate, pass the targeted proof, merge to main, and only then open the next gate branch.
Typed schema hooks must either be emitted from real evidence-bearing producers or be removed/relocated by explicit doctrine change. Silent dead hooks are forbidden.
Single-runtime decisions must not fabricate aggregate evidence. Stability scorecards, review eligibility, and candidate governance must bind to real replay/review artefacts when required.
Event semantics must prefer preserved live-event truth over timestamp-only shortcuts when the richer governed packet exists.
Keep all changes additive, typed, and lineaged; do not loosen contracts into dict-shaped side channels.
Do not change broker integration, frontend surfaces, or baseline coefficient doctrine inside this corrective pack.
Any gate that discovers a schema-location mistake must repair it explicitly and add anti-drift proof rather than leaving a misleading field in place.

leaves.title: Freeze the corrective seam and successor-pack boundaries in planning doctrine
leaves.scope: Define the bounded post-Gate-79 corrective pass without reopening the closed v6 tranche.
implementation_tasks: Write the corrective-tranche doctrine, scope, non-goals, and gate sequence.
State explicitly that Gates 59–79 remain closed and are not reopened.
Record the code-proven corrective seam so later gates cannot drift into unrelated redesign.
validation_tasks: Check the new plan against the current v6 plan and ensure numbering starts at Gate 80 without altering the historical closeout state.
leaves.pass_gate: The corrective tranche exists as a bounded authoritative plan after Gate 79 and does not reopen the closed successor pack.
leaves.merge_gate: Gate 80 remains planning/anti-drift only and does not smuggle runtime implementation work forward.

leaves.title: Add anti-drift tests that fail if declared corrective surfaces stay permanently dead
leaves.scope: Create proof-oriented tests that make the corrective seam executable rather than rhetorical.
implementation_tasks: Add tests that assert the corrective pack names the missing review surfaces explicitly.
Ensure the tests fail if the repo later claims closeout while those surfaces still have no producers or doctrine exception.
validation_tasks: Run the new tests together with planning-consistency checks to confirm the corrective pack is discoverable and bounded.
leaves.pass_gate: The corrective seam is enforced by executable anti-drift checks rather than prose alone.
leaves.merge_gate: Gate 80 closes only when the corrective pack is authoritative and test-backed.

leaves.title: Extend live event references with the missing governed semantics
leaves.scope: Preserve event-class and semantic-phase truth in the live packet so temporal/review logic can consume it honestly.
implementation_tasks: Add the missing governed fields to `LiveEventReference` and snapshot conversion.
Preserve backwards-compatible timestamp and lineage fields.
Keep the packet compact, typed, and limited to fields the temporal/review layers are allowed to read.
validation_tasks: Verify that fixture-backed event snapshots retain identity, materiality, semantic phase, event class, provenance count, and lineage keys.
leaves.pass_gate: The live event packet preserves the governed fields required by temporal and review semantics.
leaves.merge_gate: Gate 81 must enrich existing event truth without introducing unbounded news semantics.

leaves.title: Bind temporal event semantics to live event truth when present
leaves.scope: Use the richer live-event packet to derive event proximity/window semantics lawfully instead of relying only on a timestamp shortcut.
implementation_tasks: Update temporal evaluation so live-event semantics can shape event proximity/window states when a snapshot is present.
Retain `next_event_at` back-compatibility as a fallback, not as the only path.
validation_tasks: Check that timestamp-only and rich-event inputs remain deterministic and that the rich path wins when present.
leaves.pass_gate: Temporal event states are now derived from governed live-event truth when available, with explicit fallback only when it is absent.
leaves.merge_gate: Gate 81 must preserve deterministic temporal semantics and not drift into informal event interpretation.

leaves.title: Emit event-window and precursor governance review surfaces
leaves.scope: Expose the already-approved event-window and precursor governance surfaces in runtime review output.
implementation_tasks: Build typed `TemporalEventWindowSurface` and `PrecursorGovernanceSurface` producers from runtime inputs already present.
Write both surfaces into `ReviewExplanationOutput` and `review_packet`.
validation_tasks: Verify that review output carries these surfaces in real runtime runs and that lineage remains intact.
leaves.pass_gate: Runtime review output exposes event-window and precursor governance as real typed surfaces.
leaves.merge_gate: Gate 81 closes only when those surfaces are emitted by code, not merely declared by schema.

leaves.title: Build phase/carry policy review packets from applied runtime truth
leaves.scope: Expose the existing phase/carry posture law as a typed review surface sourced from the same runtime packet that altered posture.
implementation_tasks: Derive `PhaseCarryoverPolicySurface` from temporal state, carry horizon, and applied modifier packet truth.
Emit the surface into review output and packet serialisation.
validation_tasks: Check that emitted phase/carry surfaces match the applied modifier lineage and do not contradict posture permission outcomes.
leaves.pass_gate: Phase/carry posture behaviour is now reconstructable from a first-class review packet.
leaves.merge_gate: Gate 82 must reconstruct existing law only; it must not redesign modifier precedence.

leaves.title: Build event/options-stress review packets from applied runtime truth
leaves.scope: Expose event/options-stress posture law as a typed review surface sourced from temporal/options/modifier truth.
implementation_tasks: Derive `EventOptionsStressPolicySurface` from event window state, expiry state, gamma/pin conditions, and modifier packet truth.
Emit the surface into review output and packet serialisation.
validation_tasks: Verify that the emitted surface stays consistent with `modifier_control_law`, execution blockers, and stand-down outcomes.
leaves.pass_gate: Event/options-stress posture behaviour is now reconstructable from a first-class review packet.
leaves.merge_gate: Gate 82 closes only when review output can explain applied posture law without reverse-engineering from permission state alone.

leaves.title: Create scorecard producers bound to real corridor and replay evidence
leaves.scope: Produce stability scorecards only from real evidence-bearing paths, not from one runtime snapshot.
implementation_tasks: Build typed `SurfaceStabilityScorecard` producers that consume actual comparison/corridor evidence.
Bind those scorecards into review artefacts only when the required evidence packet exists.
validation_tasks: Verify that scorecards are produced from replay/corridor evidence and are not fabricated during a single runtime pass.
leaves.pass_gate: Stability scorecards are now emitted from real evidence-bearing paths and are no longer dead schema hooks.
leaves.merge_gate: Gate 83 must preserve evidence honesty: no single-snapshot fabrication.

leaves.title: Build review eligibility surfaces from explicit evidence floors and triggers
leaves.scope: Turn Gate 63 review-eligibility law into a real emitted surface backed by evidence blocks and bounded outcomes.
implementation_tasks: Create a `ReviewEligibilitySurface` builder that consumes explicit evidence blocks, trigger classes, and governed outcomes.
Emit the surface only when the necessary evidence-bearing context exists and make any absence explicit and governed.
validation_tasks: Verify that review output no longer leaves review eligibility as a dead hook when evidence is present.
leaves.pass_gate: Review eligibility becomes a real emitted governance surface when supported by evidence.
leaves.merge_gate: Gate 83 must not fake eligibility from narrative commentary or one-off heuristics.

leaves.title: Build candidate governance surfaces from promotion evidence and bounded comparison context
leaves.scope: Turn Gate 64 candidate governance law into a real emitted surface backed by promotion evidence and explicit comparison context.
implementation_tasks: Create a `CandidateGovernanceSurface` builder that consumes promotion evidence and bounded comparison/adjudication context.
Emit reserved/untouched states honestly when no candidate comparison context exists.
validation_tasks: Verify that candidate governance is no longer a schema-only hook and that emitted dispositions remain bounded.
leaves.pass_gate: Candidate governance becomes a real emitted surface with bounded states and inputs.
leaves.merge_gate: Gate 83 closes only when candidate governance is either emitted from real evidence or explicitly reserved by emitted doctrine-compliant state.

leaves.title: Populate evidence floors in review failure packets
leaves.scope: Bind failure packets to the actual evidence floor instead of leaving the field empty.
implementation_tasks: Populate `ReviewFailurePacket.evidence_floor` from the same bounded evidence blocks used by review eligibility.
Ensure the failure packet and review-eligibility packet cannot disagree about the evidence floor.
validation_tasks: Verify real runtime/review paths emit non-null evidence floors when evidence exists.
leaves.pass_gate: Failure packets carry explicit evidence floors rather than empty placeholders.
leaves.merge_gate: Gate 84 must keep evidence floors typed and bounded, not free-text.

leaves.title: Deepen failure and resolution classification coverage
leaves.scope: Make the bounded Gate 77 classes materially exercised rather than mostly vocab-level declarations.
implementation_tasks: Add bounded logic for `SIZING_FAILURE`, `ONTOLOGY_FAILURE`, and `BAD_LUCK`.
Tighten separation between blocked-trade, non-action, unresolved, and ontology-failure outcomes.
validation_tasks: Verify that each newly deepened class is reachable by deterministic targeted fixtures and that economic accountability remains aligned.
leaves.pass_gate: Failure and resolution classes are now materially differentiated and evidenced.
leaves.merge_gate: Gate 84 closes only when the deepened classes are both reachable and bounded.

leaves.title: Widen horizon economic-behaviour consistency into a bounded multi-axis rule
leaves.scope: Repair the thin Gate 79 economic-consistency proxy without redesigning the whole harness.
implementation_tasks: Define a bounded multi-axis economic-behaviour consistency rule using existing replay/review metrics.
Preserve deterministic chronology and current outcome vocabulary while widening the rule.
validation_tasks: Verify the widened rule can distinguish stable, offset-sensitive, and economically inconsistent outcomes on controlled fixtures.
leaves.pass_gate: Horizon discovery now evaluates economic behaviour on more than one thin proxy while remaining deterministic.
leaves.merge_gate: Gate 85 must widen the rule in bounded form and not redesign the harness wholesale.

leaves.title: Expose failing economic axes in fragility and ablation reports
leaves.scope: Make widened economic behaviour auditable by naming which axis actually broke stability.
implementation_tasks: Update fragility and ablation reporting so economically unstable surfaces show which axis failed.
Keep the reports compact, deterministic, and review-safe.
validation_tasks: Verify the updated reports remain backwards-compatible for existing consumers where possible.
leaves.pass_gate: Economic instability is now reviewable by axis rather than hidden inside a single spread result.
leaves.merge_gate: Gate 85 closes only when fragility/ablation reports reveal why the economic rule failed.

leaves.title: Replace first-record event winner selection with explicit bounded source precedence
leaves.scope: Refine event ingestion from deterministic first-record selection to deterministic explicit precedence.
implementation_tasks: Implement bounded winner selection across confidence tier, freshness, source class, and outage state.
Preserve conflict visibility, provenance lineage, and deterministic tie-breaking.
validation_tasks: Verify that authoritative/fresher observations win for the right reasons and that ties remain explicit and deterministic.
leaves.pass_gate: Event winner selection is now explicit, bounded, and reviewable.
leaves.merge_gate: Gate 86 must refine precedence without introducing hidden heuristics.

leaves.title: Close the corrective tranche with end-to-end anti-drift proof
leaves.scope: Prove that the previously dead review surfaces now emit from code or from real evidence-bearing paths, and then close the corrective pack.
implementation_tasks: Add closeout assertions covering runtime review surfaces, aggregate governance builders, widened horizon economics, and event precedence.
Mark the corrective pack closed only after the end-to-end proof passes.
validation_tasks: Run the closeout tests together with the targeted successor/regression tests for Gates 76–79 and the new corrective gates.
leaves.pass_gate: The corrective tranche can close only when the repo proves the review reconstruction seam is repaired end to end.
leaves.merge_gate: Gate 86 must close the corrective pass with proof, not with prose.

leaves.title: Repair Gate 69 predecessor-pack closeout evidence drift
leaves.scope: Make the preserved V6 successor pack internally consistent again without reopening Gates 59-79.
implementation_tasks: Restore the missing Gate 69 closeout note in the preserved V6 successor-pack gates file.
Keep the predecessor pack preserved as historical evidence rather than reactivating it.
validation_tasks: Prove the Gate 69 integrity test passes against the restored predecessor-pack evidence.
leaves.pass_gate: The preserved predecessor pack and its integrity tests agree again.
leaves.merge_gate: Gate 87 must repair lineage/control truth without reopening the successor pack.

leaves.title: Share Gate 82 projector law between modifier runtime and review reconstruction
leaves.scope: Remove divergent Gate 82 review reconstruction heuristics and project review surfaces from the same canonical temporal/options law used by modifier runtime.
implementation_tasks: Extract canonical phase/carry and event/options projector helpers from modifier runtime.
Make review surface emission consume those exact helpers.
Adjust Gate 82 tests to prove parity with runtime truth rather than post-hoc heuristics.
validation_tasks: Run the Gate 82 test set and the linked runtime regression tests.
leaves.pass_gate: Gate 82 review packets project from the same canonical law source as runtime.
leaves.merge_gate: No divergent review-only phase/carry mapping may remain after Gate 87.

leaves.title: Require explicit comparison context before releasing candidate governance
leaves.scope: Stop Gate 83 candidate governance from inventing champion/challenger identities when runtime review has no bounded comparison context.
implementation_tasks: Add an explicit typed comparison-context input for candidate-governance release.
Keep candidate governance reserved when promotion evidence exists but bounded comparison context does not.
Update Gate 83 docs/tests so they describe the honest release condition.
validation_tasks: Run the Gate 83 governance builder tests and linked review regression tests.
leaves.pass_gate: Candidate governance no longer emits placeholder IDs from runtime-only review.
leaves.merge_gate: Gate 87 must keep candidate release reserved until explicit comparison context exists.

leaves.title: Freeze Gate 85 widened thresholds in schema and restore static hygiene
leaves.scope: Move widened Gate 85 thresholds into the frozen rule schema and close the pyproject, mypy, ruff, and black hygiene tail.
implementation_tasks: Freeze the active-playbook-rate and conflict-count spreads on StabilityComparisonRule.
Make replay_compare consume those schema thresholds.
Remove the stale pytest asyncio config warning and restore repo-wide black/mypy/ruff cleanliness.
validation_tasks: Run Gate 84/85 tests, black --check src tests, mypy src tests, and ruff check src tests.
leaves.pass_gate: The widened Gate 85 rule is frozen in schema and repo-wide static hygiene is green.
leaves.merge_gate: Gate 87 closes only when docs, runtime, tests, and static tooling all agree again.

historical_note: Gates 80-87 closed the corrective review-reconstruction seam after Gate 79; Gate 87 then repaired the post-closeout audit defects without reopening the runtime tranche.
